scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/erd-core && npm run build -w packages/erd-designer
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/playground
scripts.release:preflight: npm run release:check && npm run release:version:patch && npm run release:sync-core-dep && npm install && npm run release:check && npm run build -w apps/playground && npm pack -w packages/erd-core --dry-run && npm pack -w packages/erd-designer --dry-run
scripts.release:preflight:no-version: npm run release:check && npm run build -w apps/playground && npm pack -w packages/erd-core --dry-run && npm pack -w packages/erd-designer --dry-run
scripts.release:version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --workspaces-update=false -w packages/erd-core && npm run release:sync-core-dep && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --workspaces-update=false -w packages/erd-designer
scripts.release:version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version --workspaces-update=false -w packages/erd-core && npm run release:sync-core-dep && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version --workspaces-update=false -w packages/erd-designer
scripts.release:version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version --workspaces-update=false -w packages/erd-core && npm run release:sync-core-dep && npm version major --no-git-tag-version --workspaces-update=false -w packages/erd-designer
scripts.release:publish: npm publish -w packages/erd-core --access public && npm publish -w packages/erd-designer --access public
scripts.release:patch: npm run release:check && npm run release:version:patch && npm run release:sync-core-dep && npm run release:publish
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:check && npm run release:version:minor && npm run release:sync-core-dep && npm run release:publish
scripts.release:major: npm run release:check && npm run release:version:major && npm run release:sync-core-dep && npm run release:publish
